text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono hasn't shown up to training, and
when I go off in search of someone who might
have seen her...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! This new macaron parfait is so crunchy and
syrupy and buono! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea this combination would work this
well. I'll have to recreate it for everyone else to
try!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Which stores still have new desserts I
haven't tried?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh! Oh no! I'm so sorry! I forgot to check the time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I tell her to be more careful next time...
